title: Leather Glue 60ml – Extra Strong, Waterproof & Flexible Adhesive – Fast-Drying Repair Glue for Leather & Vinyl – Ideal for Shoes, Bags, Sofas, Jackets, Car Seats & More
features: SUPER FLEXIBLE & STRONG BOND — Engineered with advanced adhesive technology, our leather glue offers an ultra-flexible hold that moves with your materials. Ideal for leather, vinyl, fabric, or synthetic repairs—this glue resists cracking, peeling, and everyday wear.

WATERPROOF, FAST-DRYING & LONG-LASTING— Our advanced formula provides a fully waterproof bond that dries quickly and holds strong for the long term. Perfect for repairing leather, fabric, shoes, bags, and car seats with a durable finish that withstands daily wear and tear. Ideal for DIY shoe repair, leather craft, and outdoor gear maintenance.

FEATURING A FINE METAL APPLICATOR FOR MESS-FREE APPLICATION— it's perfect for targeting small cracks, edges, seams and fine leather repair work. Applies glue exactly where it's needed, even in tight crevices or tricky corners, with no drips or waste. Equipped with a sealing cap to keep the glue from drying out, it's ideal for DIY leather repairs, craft projects and finishing touches.

ALL-PURPOSE LEATHER REPAIR GLUE— One Solution for Every Fix!No need for multiple products—this versatile adhesive tackles a wide range of leather and vinyl repairs. Perfect for restoring shoes, belts, sofas, handbags, car seats, jackets and more. Whether it’s genuine leather or faux leather, this all-in-one glue is your go-to for everyday DIY fixes and long-term restoration.

60ML LARGE CAPACITY BOTTLE — More glue, more repairs!The 60ml Large Volume Leather Adhesive is great value for money and can be used for multiple repairs. Sufficient for all crafting and restoration needs, it is ideal for DIY enthusiasts and professional restorers alike.
description: Product Description GleamGlee 60ml Professional Permanent Leather Adhesive - a 100% waterproof, flexible, dries clear, no sew solution for leather repair! Unlike regular super glue, our leather glue is specially formulated to STAY FLEXIBLE and provide a STRONGER, MORE DURABLE BOND . It won’t turn white or hard after drying, ensuring a SEAMLESS FINISH that preserves the natural look of your leather. Designed for strength, flexibility, and a sleek finish, this leather glue provides long-lasting, invisible bonds that keep your leather items looking flawless. The included metal tip ensures smooth application, prevents drying out, and allows for detailed repair work, giving you the control you need for delicate tasks. This glue is compatible with a wide range of leather types, including genuine, faux, and suede, making it an essential tool for any leather project. How to use with leather glue? 1.Surface Preparation Ensure the fabric surfaces is clean and contaminant-free. 2.Application Apply a small, even layer of adhesive to one side of the leather you wish to bond. 3.Bonding Hold the bonded sections in place 3-5 minutes to allow the adhesive to start setting. 4.Drying Time Press with a heavy object for 24-48 hours to achieve maximum strength.
